created.description: The timestamp when the PaymentAutoAllocateInstance was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the PaymentAutoAllocateInstance was last updated.

payment_auto_allocate_id.description: The ID of the payment auto allocate this instance belongs to.

status.description: The status of the payment auto allocate instance. SUCCEEDED or FAILED.

error_message.description: The error message, if the payment auto allocating failed.

payment_batch.description: The payment batch allocating all the payments.

payment_id.description: The ID of the payment that triggered the allocating of the payments.
